_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for the L7 XGBoost Optuna search space + objective. pipeline.py builds trial.suggest_* from `parameters` (order preserved -> deterministic TPE sequence at a fixed seed). N_TRIALS / H / embargo and other runtime knobs live in pipeline_parameters.json, not here.
_meta.xgb_param_name_map: reg_lambda -> XGBoost 'lambda' (mapped only inside pipeline._xgb_train); eta stays 'eta'. All other names pass through unchanged.

objective.note: L7 maximizes Train OOF trading log-growth at ONE shared floor-respecting operating point per trial (OPERATING_SPACE.theta_scoring via op_select), not auc_pr; cv_auc_pr is reported only. reg_lambda/reg_alpha/gamma provide regularization.
